INVALIDATION_NOTICE: Surrogate-reported separation 0.963 was empirically falsified (~0.23; gate is >=0.90). Adversaries capture ~64.7% of chain weight. Production promotion BLOCKED. See empirical_validation. Source: Orchestration Report 2026-06-29T01-35-48 (session 6a419a72).

CORRECTION_2026_07_01.summary: A code audit on 2026-07-01 found that no GP surrogate exists in the codebase. The optimizer (subnet/tuning/optimizer.py:172-213) calls SimulationHarness.run() directly per candidate. The 'GaussianProcess Surrogate (RBF+WhiteKernel) + ExpectedImprovement Infill' algorithm listed below in this file is metadata only and was never implemented. The real root cause of the V13-R3 separation failure is incomplete anti-gaming penalty coverage in the harness (simulation.py:870-873 penalizes only CopycatMiner and CopyTrader; SybilMiner, OverfittingMiner, SingleMetricGamer, and PartnerGamer have no penalty path and score ~0.90). See EMULATOR_SPEC.md §6.6 (corrected) and tests/test_simulation_separation.py for the reproduction.

selection.deployment_recommendation: BLOCKED - empirical validation invalidated the surrogate separation; do not promote

objectives_surrogate_predicted._note: Surrogate/optimizer predictions only. score_separation was empirically falsified — see empirical_validation.

empirical_validation.mode: simulation harness, full 14-agent adversarial population; on-chain validation still blocked (chain at <chain-host> unreachable)
empirical_validation.surrogate_vs_empirical: separation 0.963 predicted vs ~0.23 empirical (~4x); implied best-adversary 0.018 vs actual 0.733 (~40x underestimate)
root_cause: PRIMARY: training-data contamination — the 630 NSGA-II evaluations used the optimizer's simplified analytical adversary model, which scored Copycat/CopyTrader ~0.02-0.05 vs ~0.73 empirically
SECONDARY: surrogate R2=0.96 measured fit to biased training targets, not ground truth
CONTRIBUTING: Pareto collapse — all 26 solutions sit in a narrow 0.958-0.967 separation band (false local optimum)
empirical_validation.breach_rate_status: not independently re-measured; separation is the failing gate

improvement_vs_R2.score_separation: INVALID — both figures are surrogate-predicted; R3 empirical separation is ~0.23 (failed gate)

run.algorithm: NSGA-II (pymoo). NOTE: an earlier version of this file claimed 'NSGA-II + GaussianProcess Surrogate (RBF+WhiteKernel) + ExpectedImprovement Infill' — a 2026-07-01 code audit found no surrogate exists in subnet/tuning/optimizer.py. The optimizer calls SimulationHarness.run() directly. See CORRECTION_2026_07_01 above.

provenance.note: The full 41-dim decoded parameter vector was not persisted as a flat artifact; it is reconstructable from MCP run `nsga_ii_v13_r3_surrogate`. This file records the knee point by objectives + run spec + lineage, matching the convention used for the prior R2 checkpoint.
